resolved_cost.source_detail: Crafted via Silkworm Cocoon from 8x Bolt of Windwool Cloth->craft(5x Windwool Cloth->AH). Daily cooldown path that turns 8 Bolts of Windwool Cloth into one Silkworm Cocoon, which yields Imperial Silk.
resolved_cost.chain: craft[Silkworm Cocoon](8x Bolt of Windwool Cloth->craft(5x Windwool Cloth->AH))
